title: Mobile Preview Session Exchange Response
description: Scoped preview credential returned after consuming a one-time code (mirrors @selfhelp/shared IMobilePreviewExchangeData). The access_token is a short-lived JWT with purpose 'mobile_preview' held in memory only by the preview app; it is restricted to read-only preview routes by MobilePreviewAccessGuard.

expires_in.description: Seconds until the scoped token expires.
